title: kummerowia striata
intro: Kummerowia striata, also known as Japanese clover or creeping thyme, is a type of perennial flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Kummerowia striata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
